exploration_notes:
The task requires modifying 3 files:

1. **`internal/config/tracing.go`** — The core config struct. Currently `TracingConfig` only has an `Enabled` bool field with a simple `setDefaults()`. This file needs: (a) a `SamplingRate float64` field with default 1.0, (b) a `Propagators []string` field with default propagators, (c) a `validate()` method to check sampling rate is in [0,1] and propagators are from a supported set, using the existing `errFieldWrap`/`errString` error helpers from `errors.go`
